sn2.1:1.1:
1
Evaṁ me sutaṁ—​
ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. Atha kho kassapo devaputto abhikkantāya rattiyā abhikkantavaṇṇo kevalakappaṁ jetavanaṁ obhāsetvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho kassapo devaputto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
sn2.1:1.2: "bhikkhuṁ bhagavā pakāsesi, no ca bhikkhuno anusāsan"ti.
sn2.1:2.2:
2
"Subhāsitassa sikkhetha,
samaṇūpāsanassa ca;
Ekāsanassa ca raho,
cittavūpasamassa cā"ti.
sn2.1:2.3:
3
Idamavoca kassapo devaputto; samanuñño satthā ahosi. Atha kho kassapo devaputto "samanuñño me satthā"ti bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā tatthevantaradhāyīti.
